data.title: Dow futures rise despite chip gains, Sezzle and MP Materials move; buy signals for AppLovin, Robinhood.
data.description: On Thursday, the stock market experienced a decline despite an increase in chip stocks. AppLovin and Robinhood showed positive buying indications while Sezzle and MP Materials saw significant movements later in the day. Although Dow Jones Futures exhibited growth, Sezzle's performance was lackluster. This information was reported in a recent article discussing the market trends of the day.

data.title: NHC to pay quarterly dividend of 64 cents per common share on October 31, 2025 to shareholders of record on September 30.
data.description: MURFREESBORO, Tenn.-- National HealthCare Corporation (NYSE American: NHC), the oldest publicly traded long-term health care company in the US, declared a quarterly dividend of 64 cents per common share. This dividend will be disbursed to shareholders recorded on September 30, 2025, and will be paid out on October 31, 2025. The company emphasized the importance of forward-looking statements, alerting investors to the speculative nature of predictions within the press release.

data.title: Etoiles Capital Group Co., Ltd priced its $5.6 million IPO with 1,400,000 Class A ordinary shares at $4.00 each, trading on Nasdaq as EFTY on Aug 8, 2025.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Etoiles Capital Group Co., Ltd, a financial services firm based in Hong Kong, set the price for its initial public offering at $4.00 per share, offering 1,400,000 Class A ordinary shares. These shares have received clearance for listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market and are anticipated to start trading on the same day under the ticker symbol "EFTY."

data.title: Specialty Enzymes Market to hit $9.2B by 2029, driven by biotech innovation & public funding worldwide. Major contributions from Horizon Europe program ($103.6B), NIH ($42B), and BIRAC initiatives in India.
data.description: A research report by MarketsandMarkets predicts that the Specialty Enzymes Market will reach $9.2 billion by 2029, with a forecasted CAGR of 8.5% from 2024 ($6.1 billion). The top segments are Source, Type, Application, and Region, with leading applications being Pharmaceuticals, Diagnostics, Research, and Biotechnology. The market is growing due to factors like public funding, increasing pharmaceutical demand, and expanding applications in diagnostics and industrial processing. Government support globally is driving innovation in biotechnological advancements through funding initiatives and incentives. Examples include Europe's Horizon Europe program with a $103.6 billion budget, the NIH allocating over $42 billion for biomedical research in the US, and India's BIRAC actively fueling innovation in the biotechnology sector.

data.title: Wi-Fi 7 expected to boost enterprise WLAN growth by double digits in 2025, surpassing Wi-Fi 6 adoption by 2028.
data.description: In 2028, Wi-Fi 7 adoption is predicted to surpass the peak of Wi-Fi 6 usage. A report from Dell'Oro Group, a reliable source for market data in telecommunications, security, networks, and data centers, reveals this projection. The forecast suggests a significant increase in Wi-Fi 7 implementation, highlighting the ongoing advancements in wireless technology. The information was published on August 7, 2025, from REDWOOD CITY, California.

data.title: Manulife Investment Management appoints June Chua as Head of Asian Equities, Yuting Shao as Senior Macro Strategist.Key numbers: TSX/NYSE/PSE: MFC SEHK: 945, Aug. 4, 2025
data.description: On August 7, 2025, Manulife Investment Management appointed June Chua as the new Head of Asian Equities. This move signifies the company's dedication to strengthening its equity investment strategies. Chua officially stepped into her role on August 4, 2025. The news was disclosed without specifying the source. The company is listed on various stock exchanges, including TSX, NYSE, and PSE under the ticker symbol MFC, as well as on SEHK under the ticker 945.

data.title: Verisk Analytics, Inc. priced $750 million of 4.500% Senior Notes due 2030 and $750 million of 5.125% Senior Notes due 2036.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, Verisk Analytics, Inc. unveiled the pricing details for their latest offering. The company, listed on Nasdaq as VRSK, disclosed that they will be issuing $750 million worth of 4.500% Senior Notes due 2030, and another $750 million of 5.125% Senior Notes due 2036. The total offering comprises the 2030 Notes and 2036 Notes. The completion of this offering is anticipated to take place on August 21, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing prerequisites.
